name: Snowflake
tagline: Snowflake lets you interactively create recursive-descent parsers.
body:
Snowflake is licensed under the [Apache 2.0](http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html) licence.

Snowflake is actually two projects in one, each of which are described below. 

**Part I:** The Library

The library facilitates the creation of [PEG](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parsing_expression_grammar)-based recursive-descent parsers at runtime.

Quick Links:
* [Download the library as a precompiled jar file.](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTSHF1VjZsZU1xSFE/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Browse the library's source-code.](https://github.com/Mackenzie-High/snowflake/tree/master/snowflake-library)
* [View the Javadoc documentation for the library.](http://mackenzie-high.github.io/snowflake/other/javadoc/snowflake-library/index.html)
* [View unit-test coverage statistics.](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTalhfaTJNSTdJSkU/edit?usp=sharing)

**Part II:** The Graphical Grammar Editor (a.k.a. The Snowflake GUI)

The grammar editor provides you the ability to interactively develop [PEG](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parsing_expression_grammar) grammars. Specifically, upon entering a grammar and some input, you can immediately view the resulting parse-tree in browsable form.

Quick Links:
* [Quick Demonstration (Only 10 Slides)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTZ0c5Z0EwU2o0ZFk/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Cheat Sheet](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTTEx3M2VtdEtTQUE/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Download the grammar editor as a single precompiled ready-to-run jar file.](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTX3dCVXhQUWg4bmc/edit?usp=sharing)

**Part III:** Downloadable Grammars
* [Simple Demonstration] (https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTeWdGMXFTdHVtVWc/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Simple Phone Book] (https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTS014S3NQMmxOS0k/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Prefix Notation Calculator](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTUWdXV29lWHFhVms/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Infix Notation Calculator](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTWTJBYUZ2UFdxYWs/edit?usp=sharing)

**Part IV:** Downloadable Projects - These projects include executable example programs. 
* [Simple Phone Book] (https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTcDJCN09qRUZ1SWs/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Prefix Notation Calculator](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTa2N4RExIajNENnc/edit?usp=sharing)
* [Infix Notation Calculator](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTRms5UnNxa0dsM1U/edit?usp=sharing)

**Part V:** Here are some other resources and links that may help you.
* [Wikipedia: Parsing Expression Grammars](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parsing_expression_grammar)
* [The Packrat Parsing and Parsing Expression Grammars Page](http://bford.info/packrat/)
* [Parsing Expression Grammars: An Example Driven Introduction](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2am-qoFTOsTS2s0T0RRQUVQOFU/edit?usp=sharing)
* [The Grammar of Snowflake Grammars](https://github.com/Mackenzie-High/snowflake/blob/master/snowflake-gui/src/high/mackenzie/snowflake/parsergen/GrammarOfGrammars.txt)
